title: Lush Irish Prawns Ceviche
description: A festive Irish ceviche that melds raw tiger prawns with fermented flavours and a touch of Japanese bonito for a unique, satvik-friendly twist.
instructions: Rinse the raw tiger prawns under cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
Slice the prawns into bite‑sized pieces and place them in a glass bowl.
Add lemon juice, lime juice, sea salt, minced ginger, chopped coriander, and a splash of fermented soy sauce to the prawns and toss gently.
Fold in the bonito flakes and a drizzle of warm olive oil, then cover the bowl with plastic wrap.
Let the mixture rest for 10 minutes at room temperature to allow the flavors to meld.
After resting, stir in grated ginger, tahini, chopped parsley, and chives until evenly distributed.
Transfer the ceviche to a chilled serving dish and garnish with extra parsley and a few bonito shavings.
Serve immediately with crisp flatbread or steamed Irish potatoes.
